channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-15
item.description:
Our community has been bustling with activity, and we're excited to share some notable updates. The `quest-bih/oddpub` project has made significant progress, with a recent commit focusing on debugging open data detection in the database for the years 2023-2024. This targeted effort demonstrates the team's dedication to refining their tools and ensuring accuracy. The update to the ontogenerator in the `main` branch is a great example of how our community's projects are continually improving and building upon each other. As we celebrate this progress, we're reminded of the importance of meticulous debugging and maintenance in open-source research tools. By working together and sharing knowledge, we're driving innovation and advancing our collective understanding of complex topics.

28 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck, oddpub

Most active:

regcheck25 commits
metacheck2 commits
oddpub1 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. This merge was done to incorporate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as indicated by the commit message "admin updates". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch mentioned in the commits, suggesting that all recent work was focused on this branch. The nature of the administrative updates is not specified beyond the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was worked on, where the ontogenerator was updated to include debugging for open data detection in the database for the years 2023-2024. The commit message specifically mentions "debugging open data detection db 2023-2024", indicating that the focus was on identifying and fixing issues related to open data detection in the database for those years. No other branches were modified in this set of commits, and the changes were limited to the ontogenerator in the `main` branch. The work was confined to a single commit, which targeted debugging a specific aspect of the database. There were no additions of new features or modules in this set of commits, only a debugging effort.

1 commit(s) today:

  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 6 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The main branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits addressing various issues. The demo page was updated and a CLI bug was caught, as noted in one of the commits, which stated "update demo page; caught CLI bug". A bug with the card preview was fixed, as described in the commit message "fix card preview bug", resolving the issue. The survey routes were renamed to prevent interference from ad blockers, with a commit message stating "rename survey routes to avoid ad blocker interference", and a similar issue with the wizard being blocked by ad blockers was also fixed, as noted in the commit "fix: wizard incorrectly blocked by ad blockers". Additionally, the CHANGELOG.md file was updated, and an issue with an iframe remnant was handled, as described in the commit "handle iframe remenant issue".

6 commit(s) today:

  • ffb127a [main] update demo page; caught CLI bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 722db8f [main] fix card preview bug — Jamie Cummins
  • 4f8871e [main] rename survey routes to avoid ad blocker interference — Jamie Cummins
  • 41a3c91 [main] fix: wizard incorrectly blocked by ad blockers — Jamie Cummins
  • dfc6177 [main] Update CHANGELOG.md — Jamie Cummins
  • 483af6c [main] handle iframe remenant issue — Jamie Cummins
  • 039d789 [main] lock precheck (for now!) — Jamie Cummins
  • 6d3db76 [main] Merge branch 'staging' — Jamie Cummins
  • cceb94d [main] separate precheck as its own app — Jamie Cummins
  • a430ad4 [main] split precheck and regcheck domains — Jamie Cummins
  • 4e45f4f [main] add precheck functionality — Jamie Cummins
  • ad6c3aa [main] remove dimension numbers for defaults — Jamie Cummins
  • c0b987d [main] change RR flow — Jamie Cummins
  • ffa8ea4 [main] strip beta references — Jamie Cummins
  • 2751f19 [main] phase 5 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 5092647 [main] minor additions preclin — Jamie Cummins
  • 820b166 [main] phase 3 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 575f010 [main] commit phase 2 prod push — Jamie Cummins
  • cfeac5d [main] roll back RR overkill — Jamie Cummins
  • 35075aa [main] third phase of RR creation — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
